problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: The key to Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? is Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus — specifically Sleep-dependent memory consolidation — which would help 12,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
